name: Publication
description: Profile for scholarly publications and citable research outputs with persistent identifiers, publication metadata, and attribution information.
ExpectedUse: Metadata for journal articles, conference papers, preprints, datasets with DOIs, software publications, and other formally published research outputs requiring citation metadata.

Properties.Name: doi
Properties.Title: DOI
Properties.Description: DOI (Digital Object Identifier) providing a persistent, resolvable identifier for a digital object.

Properties.Name: dataCitePublicationType
Properties.Title: Publication Type
Properties.Description: DataCite ResourceTypeGeneral term indicating the broad category of a registered resource.

Properties.Name: publisher
Properties.Title: Publisher
Properties.Description: Name of the organization or entity responsible for making a resource available.

Properties.Name: datePublished
Properties.Title: Date Published
Properties.Description: ISO 8601 datetime stamp indicating when a resource was formally published or made publicly available.

Properties.Name: creator
Properties.Title: Creator
Properties.Description: ORCID URL(s) identifying the creator(s) or author(s) of a research output, dataset, or digital object.
